items.name_en: 。!!️《Includes Full Original Green Box Packaging》!!️【New】Gucci Jackie Small Shoulder Bag. This brand-new Gucci Jackie Small shoulder bag is crafted from top-quality leather, showcasing the brand's exquisite craftsmanship, crescent shape, and stylish design. The light gold-tone hardware, leather trim, and matching red and green webbing strap combine to offer more styling possibilities for this light green patent leather Gucci Jackie Small shoulder bag. Light green patent leather, light gold-tone hardware, leather lining, Inside: 1 zip pocket, Gucci logo zip pull, Handle (18cm high) Removable webbing shoulder strap (52cm high) Hook closure, Weight: approx. 0.4kg.

items.name_cn:
。🌷《With full original red box packaging》🌷【New】 From mirror leather to sparkling crystals and elegant velvet, Gucci celebrates the gift-giving season with a variety of items. Choose a brand-selected iconic handbag to inject a touch of vitality into your entire look.
Gold metallic leather
Vintage shiny palladium hardware
Red cotton-linen lining
Double G
Zip interior pocket

Spring clip flap

items.name_en: 。🌷《With full original red box packaging》🌷【New】 GG Emblem series reinterprets classic patterns with creative design and innovative functions, crafted to be a collectible choice for years to come. This long wallet is crafted with a new black GG interweave pattern fabric, reinterpreting the new accessory series. Features multiple card slots and other multi-functional compartments.
items.name_cn:
。🌷《With full original red box packaging》🌷【New】 GG Emblem series reinterprets classic patterns with creative design and innovative functions, crafted to be a collectible choice for years to come. This long wallet is crafted with a new black GG interweave pattern fabric, reinterpreting the new accessory series. Features multiple card slots and other multi-functional compartments.
New black GG interweave pattern coated fabric
Blue leather lining
Interior: Sixteen card slots, a zip pouch, and three open pockets
Weight: Approx. 148g
Model: 821213.
Closed dimensions: 10cm (W) x 19cm (H) x 2cm (D); Open dimensions: 20.5cm (W) x 19cm (H)
Color: Glossy black leather/Original leather.
Italian creation
